name: Condon Community Court
description:
Multi-use court for Pickleball, Basketball, Volleyball 
Bring a broom or blower since pine needles will need to be removed before play

name: Fort Missoula Pickleball
description: Additional courts available on tennis courts with bring your own nets/portable nets.

name: Greater Missoula Family YMCA
description: Greater Missoula Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Missoula, MT. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, and water. Reservations are not available. A membership is required to play.
open_play_schedule:
Pickleball runs November 8–June 1 (subject to change based on Y program schedules)
Monday/Wednesday/Friday—9:30–11:30 a.m.
Tuesday/Thursday—7:30–11:30 a.m.
Sunday—8:00–10:00 a.m.

name: Hawthorne Elementary
description: Come play pickleball at Hawthorne Elementary in Missoula, MT! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. Reservations are not available. The courts are private.

name: Lifelong Learning Center
description: Friday Only 2 hours with paid registration.

name: MAC
description: MAC is a place to play pickleball in Missoula, MT. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Montana Rail Link Park
description: Montana Rail Link Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Missoula, MT. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include water.

name: MPR Sports & Wellness Center
description: MPR Sports & Wellness Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Missoula, MT. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Peak Racquet Club
description: Peak Racquet Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Missoula, MT. There are 10 hard courts. 4 are outdoors and 6 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Playfair Park
description: Come play pickleball at Playfair Park in Missoula, MT! There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Seeley Lake Pickleball Courts
description: Seeley Lake Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Seeley Lake, MT. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.
fees: Fee required — $30 Annual for Seeley Lake Club Membership (18 years old and younger play FREE).

name: Swan Valley School
description: Come play pickleball at Swan Valley School in Condon, MT! There is 1 indoor wood court. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, youth programming, and lights. The court is private.
